tests.title: Three nodes Ready
tests.goal: 確認三節點叢集基線可用

tests.title: Baseline pod execution
tests.goal: 確認叢集能建立最小工作負載

tests.title: gVisor RuntimeClass probe
tests.goal: 驗證 runsc 真的在執行，而不是只有 YAML 存在

tests.title: OpenShell control plane ready
tests.goal: 確認 agent-sandbox 與 OpenShell gateway 已穩定

tests.title: OpenShell guardrails
tests.goal: 測試 egress / L7 / filesystem policy 是否成立或退化

tests.title: KubeArmor blocks SA token read
tests.goal: 確認 KubeArmor policy 確實阻擋 service account token

nodes-ready.summary: Historical validation showed 3 Ready nodes on the gVisor runtime baseline.

baseline-pod.summary: Published gVisor probe pod completed successfully.

gvisor-runtime.summary: runsc probe reported a gVisor guest kernel.

openshell-control-plane.summary: This baseline path does not install OpenShell.

openshell-guardrails.summary: This baseline path does not install OpenShell.

kubearmor-sa-block.summary: This baseline path does not install KubeArmor.

nodes-ready.summary: Terraform-built runc cluster reached 3 Ready nodes.

baseline-pod.summary: Baseline workload execution succeeded during repeated OpenShell lab runs.

gvisor-runtime.summary: This path uses runc, not gVisor.

openshell-control-plane.summary: agent-sandbox and OpenShell control plane both reached Running state.

openshell-guardrails.summary: L7 guardrails and filesystem policy both held under runc.

kubearmor-sa-block.summary: This path does not install KubeArmor.

nodes-ready.summary: gVisor-enabled OpenShell cluster reached 3 Ready nodes.

baseline-pod.summary: Runtime probe and supporting pods completed on the gVisor path.

gvisor-runtime.summary: runsc probe reported a gVisor guest kernel.

openshell-control-plane.summary: OpenShell control plane was reachable after gVisor-specific patching.

openshell-guardrails.summary: L7 guardrails held, but filesystem policy degraded because Landlock returned ENOSYS under gVisor.

kubearmor-sa-block.summary: This path does not install KubeArmor.

nodes-ready.summary: Install path exists, but the four-way matrix has not yet been re-run live on Azure.

baseline-pod.summary: Pending first live run through the new matrix runner.

gvisor-runtime.summary: This path uses runc, not gVisor.

openshell-control-plane.summary: This path does not install OpenShell.

openshell-guardrails.summary: This path does not install OpenShell.

kubearmor-sa-block.summary: KubeArmor install assets are ready, but the live policy verification has not been published yet.
